user_query:
I need you to systematically improve the Python utility in input/code/task_runner.py using an iterative evolution approach. Read input/tests/tests.json for the scoring tests and input/evolution/seed_log.json if present to continue the evolution history. Run at least two full improvement cycles (ANALYZE → PLAN → MUTATE → VERIFY → SCORE → ARCHIVE), with a maximum of 3 targeted code changes per cycle and preserving the public function interfaces. For each cycle, compute a pass-rate score against the tests (tests_passed / total_tests), measure the delta vs. the parent variant, and archive the variant. Deliverables to write under output/:

1) output/.evolution/log.json — consolidated evolution log including baseline and at least v001 and v002 variants, each with: parent, description, changes_made (each item has what/why/priority), score (0–1 pass-rate), scoring_method: "pass_rate", tests_total, tests_passed, delta (e.g., "+0.15 vs parent"), timestamp, and learned. Also include a principles_learned array at the root.
2) output/.evolution/variants/v001/task_runner.py and output/.evolution/variants/v002/task_runner.py — code snapshots for each variant. Each mutated line must include a short rationale comment with the variant tag (e.g., "# evo-v001: ..."). Do not break the public function signatures.
3) output/analysis/cycle_1.md and output/analysis/cycle_2.md — the structured analysis notes using headings: "Lessons from Previous Cycles", "Component Assessment", "Cross-Cutting Issues", and "Planned Changes" (max 3), with each change linked to a specific observation from code or tests.
4) output/report.md — a readable summary (one page max) of what changed across cycles, pass-rate scores, deltas vs. parent, and 2–3 principles learned.

Important rules: limit to at most 3 changes per cycle; every change must link to a concrete observation; compute score against the parent variant; if you hit crashes, use up to 3 targeted retries then revert and log the failure mode; preserve public interfaces; add rationale comments near each change. Write all artifacts only under output/ paths.
